purpose: Validate copied non-secret 2026-05-11 corpus readiness and tactic-affordance boundary substrate for explicit Mathlib absence, translation-smoke boundaries, absent corpus blocking, and consumer-gate enforcement without running Lean/Lake or exposing proof bodies.

secret_exclusion_rules.lean_lake: not executed by this organ; receipts carry copied run output and toolchain-boundary refs only
secret_exclusion_rules.mathlib: availability may be reported only from a passing import probe and cannot authorize dependent proof work
secret_exclusion_rules.proof_bodies: forbidden; negative fixtures may carry regression-only forbidden-key rows and generated receipts may record key names only
secret_exclusion_rules.private_source_refs: forbidden except public-safe macro lineage refs and digests
secret_exclusion_rules.mathlib_probe_body: not exported as proof authority; the public fixture carries the source ref and digest only

authority_ceiling: real corpus readiness and Mathlib absence boundary receipt only; not Lean/Lake execution, Mathlib proof authority, corpus benchmark authority, provider authority, runtime correctness, or release operations
anti_claim: This fixture manifest accepts copied non-secret corpus/toolchain readiness substrate and regression-only leakage guards. It does not authorize Lean/Lake, provider calls, proof bodies, public release, hosted deployment, publication operations, recipient work, or secret export.
